reviews.review_description:
Just for the record, I'm not a little kid. I'm a middle aged women who LOVES VR. My favorites are survival games, but I've become obsessed with Supermarket Simulators over the past year. I've purchased every one. Cheap, horrible ratings, expensive, no ratings. I've bought them all in hopes I'd find a good one. I haven't really. They're all "early access" and after release you never get an update or fixes. With that said, this game is AMAZING! I just found it today. It's not technically a supermarket game, but it's the best of both worlds. I'm a HUGE cat lover. I think cats are fantastic. The cats are SO freaking cute in this game. My heart almost exploded when I saw the silver tabby in the corner making biscuits! Graphics are amazing. The cats look great and they act very realistic. The controls on every supermarket game I've played have been horrible. The controls here are great. Smooth, you can crouch, move while you're checking people out. I haven't had a single problem with the Controls. There is already so much content. I've been playing for over an hour and have barely scratched the surface. I'm looking forward to playing more. Really, the game is so amazing. I only have 1 complaint...the tablet on the side. I'm am always accidentally pulling it up when I'm stocking shelves and grabbing boxes. Maybe if possible, there could be an option to close it. Push a button to pull it up instead of grabbing it. Just a suggestion, I may be the only person who has the problem. It's fantastic either way. Thanks for a great game during this slow boring time in VR on Quest.
I am playing on the Quest 3S.

developer_response.body:
We're really glad that you enjoy our game.
We will work on optimizing the gameplay experience based on your feedback.
Feel free to join our Discord community here: https://discord.gg/at5QaPDjvg
We will set priorities for future updates according to community votes.
You can also report game issues and share your suggestions with us there in a timely manner.

reviews.review_description: Honestly so far this game is one of the best solo player VR games I have. If you like tcg card shop simulator and cats this game is for you. It's very fun and there is a lot more to come. So far for early access there is plenty to do and the devs are just getting started. I really recommend this game.

developer_response.body: Hey zombiecrusher101! Thanks for the super thoughtful feedback—we really appreciate it! ❤️ Stoked to have you in the Discord already. Let's keep the convo going right here: https://discord.gg/at5QaPDjvg

reviews.review_description:
It's a fun game, but I wish there was a setting to turn off the vignette used to prevent VR motion sickness.
Update May 27: The developers responded and added a setting to turn off the vignette. I really appreciate them listening to the feedback. Great support!

developer_response.body: Hey townworkman! Huge props for catching that major oversight — we seriously appreciate the love! ❤️ Hop into our Discord to keep the convo going: https://discord.gg/at5QaPDjvg

reviews.review_description: I am a cat lover based of my user and it is so fun and I love chucking cat but it’s weird when the breed anyways 5 stars
